items.title: Moscow holds scaled-back Victory Day parade as Ukraine truce kicks in
items.desc: Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelensky agreed to uphold a three-day ceasefire announced by U.S. President Donald Trump while Russia holds its annual Victory Day parade on Saturday, though the event was set to be scaled back over security fears.
